subcodes.first_line: O Husayn! Hearken with thy soul's ear unto the Voice of the Wronged One. The Tongue of Eternity speaketh now in Persian, that [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا حسین ندای مظلوم را بگوش جان اصغا نما لسان قدم بپارسی تکلم میفرماید تا
subcodes.subjects: @teaching the Cause; call to teach, @service to others; to the Cause of God, @praise and encouragement, @wisdom [hikmat], @spiritual transformation
